source_selection_rule.rule: Use the commit at the external repository default branch tip returned by the first successful clone for this preflight, record its commit and tree SHA, and switch the external checkout to that exact commit in detached-HEAD state.

checkpoint_selection_rule.rule: Use only a checkpoint linked by the frozen external source. Continue only if the source identifies one authoritative checkpoint and its model variant without score-based choice. Record every downloaded member, byte size, SHA-256, format, and claimed/verified variant.

SD300_smoke_cohort_selection_rule.identity_rule: For each canonical finger position 1 through 10, select the first identity in manifest order and use that same identity for SD300b and SD300c.

GO_gates: external source commit and tree are frozen
source and third-party licenses are documented
checkpoint use status is sufficiently clear for research
official checkpoint is available and content-addressed
model variant is proven from source and state dictionary
strict state-dictionary loading has no missing, unexpected, or shape-mismatched keys
no training or fine-tuning is required
training data provenance is sufficient and there is no evidence of direct SD300b/c overlap
one justified deterministic preprocessing policy handles both datasets and both image roles
all embeddings are finite and non-constant
fresh-process CPU repeatability is exact for the frozen gate
the original similarity function is identified independently of SD300 scores
the existing benchmark contract needs no change
no unresolved security or provenance blocker remains
NO-GO_gates: checkpoint is unavailable, mutable, ambiguous, or unofficial
checkpoint usage terms are insufficiently clear
state dictionary requires an unexplained non-strict load
SD300 preprocessing or PPI handling requires score-based or arbitrary selection
CPU inference is not sufficiently repeatable
dependencies cannot be frozen without unsafe main-environment changes
training and evaluation provenance cannot be separated
code or weights lack sufficient provenance
forbidden_selection_signals: self scores except post-freeze sanity checking
